summary: Iteration 61 - SSE Streaming & Hedera Mainnet Integration Testing Complete. All backend SSE endpoints and Hedera blockchain seal features verified working. Frontend real-time updates via SSE confirmed with live agent status changes and execution log panel.

minor.issue: SSE stream takes 12-18 seconds to complete due to simulated agent delays. First test may timeout if not given sufficient time.

issues: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in Dashboard component

critical_code_review_comments: SSE streaming correctly implements all required events: ceremony_started, agent_started, agent_completed, consensus_started, sealing_blockchain, consensus_reached, ceremony_complete
Hedera integration uses REAL mainnet topic 0.0.10373605 with actual HCS submissions
Blockchain seal includes all required fields: topic_id, transaction_id, sequence_number, explorer_url, hcs_submitted
Frontend correctly processes SSE events and updates agent cards in real-time (idle→running→passed)
Execution Log panel shows timestamped colored entries (green for PASS, blue for Hedera)

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7/8 tests passed - 1 timeout due to long SSE stream)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements and SSE integration verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test ceremonies with prefix 'TEST_' including: TEST_SSE_Stream_Document, TEST_SSE_Data_Verification, TEST_Hedera_Seal_Attempt_*, TEST_Hedera_Topic_Verify_*, TEST_Sync_Execute_Fallback, Playwright SSE Test Document
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSE and Hedera features fully tested. SSE endpoint GET /api/ceremony/{id}/stream returns text/event-stream with all expected events. Hedera seal uses real mainnet topic 0.0.10373605. Frontend EventSource integration works correctly with real-time agent card updates and execution log panel.

verified: Confidence bars animate as agents complete
Execution Log panel appears with LIVE STREAM indicator
Timestamped entries with color coding (green=PASS, blue=Hedera)

verified_elements: Transaction ID field with full tx hash

mocked_apis_list: Verifier Agent (simulated biometric checks with random confidence 0.78-0.99)
Witness Agent (simulated audit trail with random confidence 0.82-0.99)
real_integrations: Sealer Agent connected to REAL Hedera Mainnet HCS topic 0.0.10373605
mocked_apis.note: Verifier and Witness agents are simulated. Sealer Agent submits real transactions to Hedera Mainnet.
